channel.title: Telegram on Xizi's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Telegram on Xizi's Blog

item.title: Telegram解锁+86聊天,加机器人spambot进行解锁.
item.description: Telegram Sorry, you can only send messages to mutual contacts at the moment. MORE INFO OK Telegram 抱歉，您目前只能向相互的联系人发送消息。 更多信息 好的 @SpamBot发送/start Q: Good news, no limits are currently applied to your account.
